category_sources: Official Grace homepage at https://plasma-gate.weizmann.ac.il/Grace describes Grace as a bootstrapped graphing/plotting tool for data and X11 environments.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title and documentation use Grace: https://plasma-gate.weizmann.ac.il/Grace.
docs_sources: Official Grace documentation includes the FAQ at https://plasma-gate.weizmann.ac.il/Grace/doc/FAQ.html.
Official Grace documentation includes the User's Guide at https://plasma-gate.weizmann.ac.il/Grace/doc/UsersGuide.html.
repo_sources: Official Grace developer page lists anonymous CVS access and the ViewVC web interface for the Grace source repository.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was researched.
tags_sources: Official FAQ and User's Guide document plotting, data display, export formats, and command-line use.
source_facts.description identifies a WYSIWYG 2D plotting tool for X11.
